last_assistant_message:
Firmware is compiling in the background — the first build downloads the full ESP32-S3 toolchain and compiles all of ESPHome, so it'll take a few minutes. I'll let you know when it's done.

While it builds: once it compiles, I can flash it over USB since the Shrooly is still plugged in. After this flash, the device will automatically POST temperature, humidity, water level, and fan RPM to your API every 60 seconds.
